title: Was UFO Whistleblower Dave Grusch Being LIED To?
summary: A brief discussion about whether UFO whistleblower David Grusch was potentially being deceived by coordinated disinformation from intelligence sources. Grusch explains his methodology for verifying sources and expresses confidence in the credibility of his approximately 40 sources based on personal relationships and their high-level credentials.

key_claims.claim: Approximately 40 people were interviewed as sources
Many of the sources were people Grusch had known throughout his career and had personal friendships with
Some of the sources were Senate-confirmed individuals
If the sources ever go public, their identities would be surprising due to their high-level positions
